title: Placeholder misconfiguration in Perplexity tool
symptom: The Perplexity tool node throws a misconfiguration error when the AI Agent sends nested input instead of a flat string. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.
not_this_if: AI Agent sends flat string input
root_cause: The AI Agent sends input wrapped in a nested object, while the Perplexity tool expects a flat string for the placeholder. This mismatch leads to the placeholder not resolving correctly, causing a misconfiguration error.
fix_steps: Set the Placeholder Type in the Perplexity tool node to 'Not Specified' to accept an object.
Alternatively, adjust the Request Body to reference the nested value directly, like this: { 'role': 'user', 'content': {query} }.
agent_instruction: Adjust the placeholder type or modify the request body to resolve the nested structure issue.
